skill.name: Azure AI Vision Image Analysis SDK for Python
skill.description: Azure AI Vision Image Analysis SDK for captions, tags, objects, OCR, people detection, and smart cropping. Use for computer vision and image understanding tasks.
skill.summary: Python SDK for Azure computer vision - image captioning, object detection, OCR, and smart cropping
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only documentation skill containing reference material for the Azure AI Vision Image Analysis SDK. No executable code was detected. The skill provides documentation on how to use Microsoft's Azure computer vision service for image analysis tasks including captioning, object detection, OCR, and smart cropping. No security concerns identified.

content.user_title: Analyze Images with Azure AI Vision
content.value_statement: Developers need to integrate computer vision capabilities into Python applications but struggle with complex Azure SDK documentation. This skill provides ready-to-use code examples and best practices for image captioning, object detection, OCR, and smart cropping with Azure AI Vision.
actual_capabilities: Generate captions for images using Azure AI Vision
Detect and identify objects with bounding boxes
Extract text from images using OCR
Detect people in images with location coordinates
Analyze multiple visual features in a single call
limitations: Requires Azure subscription and valid credentials
Network connectivity needed for API calls
Image size limited to 20MB per request
Only supports specific image formats (JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, WEBP, ICO, TIFF, MPO)

use_cases.title: Automate Document Processing
use_cases.description: Extract text from scanned documents and forms automatically using OCR capabilities
use_cases.target_user: Business analysts processing large volumes of paper documents

use_cases.title: Build Image Cataloging Systems
use_cases.description: Automatically generate captions and tags for uploaded images in media libraries

use_cases.title: Create Smart Thumbnails
use_cases.description: Generate contextually-aware image crops for responsive web design
use_cases.target_user: Web developers needing automated image optimization

prompt_templates.title: Basic Image Caption
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me how to get a caption for an image using Azure AI Vision ImageAnalysisClient in Python

prompt_templates.title: Extract Text from Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Write Python code to extract all text from an image using the READ visual feature

prompt_templates.title: Detect Objects with Bounding Boxes
prompt_templates.prompt: How do I detect objects in an image and get their bounding box coordinates using Azure AI Vision?
prompt_templates.scenario: Object detection for computer vision applications

prompt_templates.title: Async Batch Processing
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me how to use the async client to analyze multiple images concurrently

output_examples.input: Show me how to get a caption for an image using Azure AI Vision
output: Use the CAPTION visual feature to get a human-readable description of the image
The result includes both the caption text and a confidence score

output_examples.input: How do I extract text from scanned documents?
output: Use the READ visual feature for OCR text extraction
Supports multiple languages through the language parameter

best_practices: Request only the visual features you need to reduce latency and cost
Use async clients for high-throughput batch processing scenarios
Always handle HttpResponseError for robust error handling
anti_patterns: Requesting all visual features at once when you only need one
Ignoring error handling for network failures or invalid images
Using API keys in code instead of environment variables

faq.question: What image formats does Azure AI Vision support?
faq.answer: Supported formats include JPEG, PNG, GIF, BMP, WEBP, ICO, TIFF, and MPO. Maximum file size is 20MB.

faq.question: How do I authenticate with Azure AI Vision?
faq.answer: You can use API key authentication with AzureKeyCredential or Entra ID authentication with DefaultAzureCredential.

faq.question: What is the difference between CAPTION and DENSE_CAPTIONS?
faq.answer: CAPTION provides a single sentence describing the entire image. DENSE_CAPTIONS provides multiple captions for different regions within the image.

faq.question: Can I analyze local images instead of URLs?
faq.answer: Yes, use the analyze() method with image_data parameter instead of analyze_from_url().

faq.question: How do I optimize for cost when using Azure AI Vision?
faq.answer: Only request the visual features you need. Each feature adds to the cost and processing time.

faq.question: Does this skill work with Claude Code and Codex?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill is compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for generating code examples and explanations.
